title: Xora
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Xora.jpg]] |name=Xora |homeworld=[[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] (35:9 GrS), [[Void Station]] |species=[[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin=Green |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Jib Kopatha]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I don't like to be reminded of the past.''"
"''Glrrk... but you'll never... escape it...|Xora's last words to Darth Vader|[[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]]}} '''Xora''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] who was employed by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] information broker [[Jib Kopatha]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Her brothers and sisters were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[7 BBY/Legends|7 BBY]] when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] sterilized one of [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen's]] major [[City/Legends|cities]] in the wake of an outbreak of an experimental bacterial contagion. ==Biography== [[File:XoraDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Darth Vader chokes Xora to death.]] Shortly after the [[Evacuation of Yavin]], she, along with several of her Falleen co-workers (including [[Zuur]]), attempted to assassinate [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] during his visit to [[Void Station]] in revenge for his decimation of their species. As Vader was departing, Xora approached him, promising him information about the Rebels. Vader took the bait and followed her into a seemingly empty room, where he was shot by one of the other Falleen. Xora brandished a knife to strike herself, but Vader knocked her back. They were no match for the mighty [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], and Xora watched as they were quickly slain. Vader grabbed her by the throat and started choking her. As she struggled to free herself and breathe, Vader told her he didn't like being reminded of his [[Time/Legends|past]]. Moments from death in his grip, Xora used her last words to tell the Sith Lord that he couldn't escape his past, but Vader ignored her and snapped her neck. {{Char-stub}} ==Personality and traits== Xora held a deep hatred against Vader and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], viewing him as a monster. Going against her species' traditions, she openly showed her emotions and acted impatiently, possibly due to the trauma of the losses Vader had caused her. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Xora}} *[[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Xora |de=Xora |nl=Xora |pl=Xora }} [[Category:Clerical workers and assistants]] [[Category:Falleen]] [[Category:Females]]
